programmes.show_description: Deep blue horror. A crew of an underwater nuclear base fight for their lives when an alien menace at the bottom of the ocean is disturbed. (1988)
Tense thriller. When a Vietnam veteran returns home from prison to discover that a violent biker gang has been harassing his family, he enlists the help of a drug baron in a quest for revenge. (1986)
Sci-fi action. When an alien prison ship crash lands in the California desert, the only hope of stopping the swarm of savage creatures rests with a secret government agency. (2020)
Welcome to LEGEND XTRA - your home for movies and series full of action, adventure, suspense and much more!
The story of Captain Askwith's airship continues with a deadly crash that traps Challenger and the others seven years in the past. S3, Ep1/22
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Sci-fi adventure with Mario Van Peebles. When a mysterious fleet of otherworldly ships wage war on planet Earth, the crew of the warship USS Iowa prepare to defend the world. (2012)

British political thriller. An SAS captain infiltrates a gang of terrorists planning to attack the home of the US Ambassador - but his relationship with their leader threatens the operation. (1982)
Violent crime thriller with Nicolas Cage. When his brother falls foul of a ruthless mobster, a straight-laced man must go against the odds to save him with the help of an old friend. (2017)

Tense crime thriller with Michael C Hall. After being hailed as a hero for shooting a burglar in his home, a man begins to fear for his life when the thief's father turns up seeking revenge. (2014)
